About Sid

A Global Perspective,
Built Over 15 Years

I'm Siddharth — Sid to most — a Principal AI Product Manager with a career that has taken me from the engineering labs of IIT Kharagpur and Renault-Nissan to the boardrooms of Oxford, the startup trenches of Bengaluru, the business hubs of Dubai, and the academic campuses of West Africa.

I've spent over 15 years building, shipping, and scaling high-impact AI products across GenAI, Deep Learning, and Agentic AI — at companies like Schneider Electric and GE Healthcare, and as an entrepreneur with my own AI SaaS venture. My work spans a €50M AI portfolio, a granted US patent, and products touching thousands of users globally.

Living across India, the UK, UAE, and Ghana — and travelling through more than 30 countries — has given me a genuinely global lens. I understand how culture shapes business, how ambition looks different in different contexts, and how to lead across boundaries. These experiences form the core of the coaching and consulting I offer today.

Fluent in English, Hindi, Malayalam, and conversational French, I bring both strategic depth and a human touch to every engagement.

What I Offer

Two Ways I Can
Help You Grow

Whether you're navigating the early chapters of your career or steering a business through its next stage of growth — I bring structured thinking, global experience, and a track record of results.

01

For Young Professionals

Career Coaching

Early-career decisions compound. I work with ambitious professionals to chart a deliberate path — helping you find clarity, build the right skills, and make moves that matter. Drawing on a journey that spans IIT, Oxford, four countries, and multiple industries, I offer perspective that's both global and grounded.

  • Career roadmapping and goal-setting
  • Interview prep and personal branding
  • Navigating pivots — industry, function, or geography
  • MBA and higher education guidance
  • Leadership and executive presence development
02

For Small & Medium Businesses

Business Consulting

Most SMBs are sitting on untapped potential — in their processes, products, and people. I help founders and business leaders cut through complexity, embrace the right technologies (including AI), and build scalable strategies. This isn't theory — it's hands-on guidance from someone who has done it.

  • AI strategy and digital transformation roadmaps
  • Product-market fit and go-to-market strategy
  • Operational efficiency and process optimisation
  • Building and managing cross-functional teams
  • P&L management and growth planning
